scriptLines:
query: 'Select 
Cast(F.Date  as date)                                   as [PerformanceDate]          ,
F.Data_Source_type                                      as [DataSourcetype]         ,
F.Data_Source_name                                      as [DataSourcename]         ,
F.Traffic_source                                        as [Trafficsource]          ,
F.Account                                               as [AccountID]            ,
F.Campaign                                              as [CampaignName]           ,
case when F.Traffic_source='Facebook' then
                         Case when F.Data_Source_name in ('Statewide Bath - Swish' ,'Statewide Windows - Swish' ,'FHIA Windows - Swish') 
                                        and Coalesce(Eomonth(cast(replace(replace(C.CampaignStartTime,'T',' '),'+','.') as date)),'2025-10-31')>='2025-10-31' then 'Meta'
                           when F.Data_source_name like '%swish%' then 'Swish' else 'Meta' end 
     Else F.Campaign_Type__Google_Ads end                     as [CampaignType]           ,
F.Ad_Group                                              as [AdGroupName]            ,
AD_group_Type__Google_ads                               as AD_group_Type              ,
F.Ad                                                    as [AdName]                 ,
AD_Type__Google_ads                                     as AD_Type                  ,
F.Campaign_ID                                           as [CampaignID]             ,
F.Ad_Group_ID                                           as [AdGroupID]              ,
F.AD_ID                                                 as [ADID]                   ,
F.Media_type                                            as [Mediatype]              ,
F.Paid__Organic                                         as [PaidOrganic]            ,
F.Currency                                              as [Currency]               ,
Case when F.Traffic_Source='Facebook' then 'Placement' else 'Conversion_Name' end   as     Breakdown_Attribute               ,
Case when F.Traffic_Source='Facebook' then FB.Placement__Facebook_Ads  else Conversion_category_name__Google_Ads  end as [Attribute_1]                    ,
Case when F.Traffic_Source='Facebook' then NULL  else Conversion_name__Google_Ads  end   as [Attribute_2]                                                 ,
Coalesce(FB.Cost,F.Cost)                            as [Cost]                   ,
Coalesce(FB.Clicks,F.Clicks)                        as [Clicks]                 ,
Coalesce(FB.Impressions,F.Impressions)              as [Impressions]            ,
Coalesce(FB.Conversions,F.Conversions)              as [Conversions]            ,
Coalesce(FB.LinkClicks,F.Link_Clicks)               as [LinkClicks]             ,
F.All_Conversions                                             as All_Conversions               , 
F.All_Conversion_Value                                        as All_Conversion_Value          ,          
F.Day_of_week                                       as [Dayofweek]              ,
F.Month                                             as [Month]                  ,
F.Week                                              as [Week]                   ,
F.Year                                              as [Year]                   ,
F.Week_number                                       as [Week_number]            ,
[RZID]                                              as [RZID]                 ,
[SRSID]                                             as [SRSID]                 ,
[Ad_link]                                            as [Adlink]


from 

[ODS].[FUNNEL_AD_PERFORMANCE_METRICS_DETAIL] F  
Left join ODS.FUNNEL_Facebook_AD_Performance_Metrics FB 
on F.Traffic_source=FB.Traffic_Source and F.Campaign_Id=FB.Campaign_ID and F.Ad_group_Id=FB.AD_group_ID and F.Ad_Id=FB.AD_ID and cast(F.Date as date)=Cast(FB.Date as date)
Left join EDW.DIM_Facebook_campaign C on F.Traffic_Source='Facebook' and F.Account=C.AccountId and F.Campaign_ID=C.CampaignId',

preSQLs:['Delete  T1
--Select Distinct T1.TrafficSource, Eomonth(T1.PerformanceDate) 
from ZML.FACT_AD_PERFORMANCE_METRICS_DETAIL T1
 join 
(
     Select TrafficSource,PerformanceDate from 
     (Select Distinct TrafficSource, EOMONTH(PERFORMANCEDATE) as PerformanceDate from ZML.FACT_AD_PERFORMANCE_METRICS_DETAIL ) F
     Left join 
     (SELECT Distinct Traffic_source ,EOMONTH(DATE) Date FROM ODS.FUNNEL_AD_PERFORMANCE_METRICS_DETAIL) O 
     On F.TrafficSource=O.Traffic_source and F.PerformanceDate =O.Date
     Where O.Traffic_Source is not null and O.Date is not null --Order by 1,2
     
)T2  on T1.TrafficSource=T2.Trafficsource and Eomonth(T1.PerformanceDate) =T2.PerformanceDate'],
